name: Zapier
description: Interact with your Zapier instance to manage Zaps, apps, actions, authentications, zap templates, and more.

tools.name: zapier_list_zaps
tools.label: List Zapier Zaps
tools.description: List all Zaps in your Zapier account. Supports filtering by app and pagination.
tools.promptSnippet: List Zaps from your Zapier account.

app.description: Filter Zaps by app name or ID.

limit.description: Max number of Zaps to return (default 10, max 100).

tools.name: zapier_get_zap
tools.label: Get Zapier Zap
tools.description: Get details of a specific Zap by its ID.
tools.promptSnippet: Get details of a specific Zap.

tools.name: zapier_create_zap
tools.label: Create Zapier Zap
tools.description: Create a new Zap with a title and steps. Each step requires an action ID, inputs, and optionally an authentication ID.
tools.promptSnippet: Create a new Zap on Zapier.
promptGuidelines: Use zapier_list_apps and zapier_get_actions first to discover available apps and action IDs.
Use zapier_get_input_fields to discover required inputs for each action before creating a Zap.

steps.description: Ordered list of steps. Each step has action (action ID), inputs (key-value map), authentication (auth ID or null), and optional alias.

inputs.description: Key-value input fields for this step.

authentication.description: Authentication ID to use, or null.

tools.name: zapier_enable_zap
tools.label: Enable Zapier Zap
tools.description: Enable (turn on) a Zap by its ID.

tools.name: zapier_disable_zap
tools.label: Disable Zapier Zap
tools.description: Disable (turn off) a Zap by its ID.

tools.name: zapier_list_apps
tools.label: List Zapier Apps
tools.description: List available apps on Zapier. Supports search and pagination.

query.description: Search query to filter apps by name.

tools.name: zapier_get_actions
tools.label: Get Zapier Actions
tools.description: List available actions (triggers, creates, searches) for a specific app.
tools.promptSnippet: Get available actions for a Zapier app.

app.description: App ID to list actions for.

action_type.description: Filter by action type: 'read' for triggers/searches, 'write' for creates/actions.

tools.name: zapier_get_input_fields
tools.label: Get Zapier Input Fields
tools.description: Get input fields required for a specific action. Needed before creating a Zap step.
tools.promptSnippet: Get required input fields for a Zapier action.

inputs.description: Existing inputs for dependent field resolution.

tools.name: zapier_get_output_fields
tools.label: Get Zapier Output Fields
tools.description: Get output fields produced by a specific action.
tools.promptSnippet: Get output fields for a Zapier action.

inputs.description: Existing inputs for dependent field resolution.

tools.name: zapier_get_choices
tools.label: Get Zapier Field Choices
tools.description: Get dropdown choices for a specific input field of an action.
tools.promptSnippet: Get choices for a Zapier action input field.

field.description: Field key to get choices for.

tools.name: zapier_list_authentications
tools.label: List Zapier Authentications
tools.description: List connected authentication accounts for the user.

tools.name: zapier_list_zap_templates
tools.label: List Zapier Zap Templates
tools.description: List available Zap templates, optionally filtered by apps.

apps.description: Comma-separated app IDs to filter templates.

tools.name: zapier_guess_zap
tools.label: Guess Zapier Zap
tools.description: Use AI to suggest a Zap configuration based on a natural language description. Beta feature.
tools.promptSnippet: AI-suggest a Zap from a natural language description.

description.description: Natural language description of desired automation.

tools.name: zapier_step_test
tools.label: Test Zapier Step
tools.description: Test a single step of a Zap to verify it works correctly.
